meaning: a欣赏的,有欣赏力的,表示感激的,承认有价值的
examples: We have been very appreciative of their support.
Colin's face was thoughtful and appreciative.
There is a murmur of appreciative laughter.
"I am very appreciative of what Torts has done here, " Sather said during a conference call.
The greatest compliment you can pay your host is to be attentive, relaxed, and appreciative.
